title: Configure Cross-Platform Build Pipeline
description: Set up GitHub Actions or similar CI/CD pipeline to build RickTerminal for macOS (universal binary for Intel + Apple Silicon), Windows (x64 + arm64), and Linux (AppImage + deb). Configure code signing for macOS and Windows. Because we're not savages who build on only one platform.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions workflow builds on macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest
macOS builds produce universal binary (.dmg) signed with Developer ID
Build artifacts are uploaded as release assets
Version number is injected from git tag
agent_output: GitHub Actions workflow for macOS (ARM64+x64), Windows, Linux. Includes TypeScript check, lint, Rust fmt/clippy jobs.
